posts.author: JillianAD (Jillian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Even in MyWork

And make sure the text wraps so you can see it all. (In every column, but most importantly the name of the item.)

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to see my whole board more easily.

posts.author: Jacques1 (Skylar Reynolds)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Jillian — that’s a great suggestion! Having the ability to manually adjust column widths — especially in My Work — would make it much easier to view full item names and key details without constant scrolling or hovering. Text wrapping would also be a big improvement for readability and quick scanning. It sounds like this feature could really enhance visibility and accessibility across different board views. Hopefully, the product team considers adding this flexibility in future updates!
